description_long: This object is a large, whimsical donut with a thick coating of glossy chocolate glaze covering its upper surface and dripping down the sides. The donut is generously adorned with colorful cylindrical sprinkles in shades of pink, yellow, blue, and white, adding a playful and festive appearance. The base of the donut appears to be set in a pool of melted chocolate, which has also caught some of the sprinkles, creating a visually rich foundation. The donut itself has a classic toroidal shape with a slightly uneven, realistic texture, and a central hole. The chocolate glaze is unevenly applied, with some areas thicker and more textured, giving a sense of indulgence and richness. The overall presentation is eye-catching and would stand out in any urban food display or street fair setting.
description: A large donut with glossy chocolate glaze, colorful sprinkles, and a base of melted chocolate, featuring a realistic, textured surface.
description_view_0: Side view showing the donut's thick chocolate glaze, colorful sprinkles, and the chocolate pool at the base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the donut's central hole, textured dough, and the chocolate glaze dripping down.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear display of the chocolate glaze, sprinkles, and the donut's rounded form.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the full coverage of chocolate glaze, dense sprinkles, and the central hole.
attribute_icing_type: Chocolate glaze with a glossy, thick, and slightly uneven texture.
attribute_topping_type: Colorful cylindrical sprinkles (pink, yellow, blue, white).
attribute_placement_location: Set on a pool of melted chocolate, unwrapped and not on any additional surface.
